title: Vento del Sud
writer: Giuseppe Mangione, Enzo Provenzale, Elio Petri
actors: Renato Salvatori, Claudia Cardinale, Annibale Ninchi
plot: Antonio Spagara, a young Sicilian worker, has been assigned by the Mafia to murder a nobleman, Marquis Macri. But at the last minute Antonio reneges on his commitment and instead of killing the father, he flees to Palermo with Gra...
